description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the registry.gitlab.com/pages/hugo/hugo_extended:latest Docker image with a default before_script that installs git and go via apk. Define a pages job (implicitly in the deploy stage) that runs only when $CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME equals $CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH, executes 'hugo mod get -u' then 'hugo', and publishes the generated 'public' directory as an artifact. Define a test job (in the test stage) that runs when $CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME does not equal $CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH, runs the same 'hugo mod get -u' and 'hugo' commands, but does not produce artifacts. No additional services, caches, or deployment targets beyond GitLab Pages are required.
